metadata.description: COG253 Unified Skill Lattice — cognitive capabilities mapped to Christopher Alexander's 253-pattern topology for navigating, discovering, and composing skills across ecosystem/component/implementation hierarchies.

plugins.name: pattern-navigator
plugins.description: Navigate and query the GH253 pattern topology — 253 patterns mapped to GitHub/software domains with relationship traversal and domain mapping.

plugins.name: skill-composer
plugins.description: Decompose, transform, and compose skills across domains using structural analogy and the General Relevance Transform.

plugins.name: template-generator
plugins.description: Scaffold new projects, skills, extensions, and devcontainers from curated templates covering Lua/nn, Plan 9, WASM, and more.

plugins.name: dsl-factory
plugins.description: Design and create domain-specific languages with grammar definitions, parsers, lexicon extraction, and validation.

plugins.name: cognitive-kernel
plugins.description: Build and operate cognitive development kernels — Plan 9, Inferno-OS, and OpenCog-based distributed inference systems.

plugins.name: formulation-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze and optimize formulations — skincare compounds, neural network topologies, brain models, and mathematical constructs.

plugins.name: spark
plugins.description: Comprehensive guidance for building modern web applications with opinionated defaults for tech stack, design system, and code standards.
